summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly identifies this as an inventory shard rather than a dedupe cluster. Hydrated open PRs were classified conservatively; refs missing hydrated preflight state were isolated as needs_human for live-state hydration.
